title: [你問我答] 用BNO係EU註冊Residency比人Rejected

replies.msg:
用BNO入境冇印
幫緊一間波蘭遊戲公司做Marketing
因為計我係EU citizen (我有曬UK Insurance, NINO, 地址)
所以冇幫我做work permit
EU既free movement既條件係搬到第二個member state後要註冊residency
上星期去註冊比人reject咗
佢話BNO唔係EU Passport 叫我做Resident Card

而家Visa又整唔到 居住註冊又做唔到
真係等下個月Brexit 同其他英國人一齊攬炒

Workers
People who are employed in another EU country are entitled to live there. Jobseekers are also allowed to stay in another country while they are looking for a job. (See the right to look for a job)

The host country may require them, as "EU migrant workers", to register with the authorities as residents. (See Directive 2004/38/EC)

Other legal and administrative formalities depend on the length of stay – up to 3 months, more than 3 months, or permanent.
怪就怪蠢老鼠

Workers
People who are employed in another EU country are entitled to live there. Jobseekers are also allowed to stay in another country while they are looking for a job. (See the right to look for a job)

The host country may require them, as "EU migrant workers", to register with the authorities as residents. (See Directive 2004/38/EC)

Other legal and administrative formalities depend on the length of stay – up to 3 months, more than 3 months, or permanent.

replies.msg:
做咗一晚Research之後 發現EU Law係有個大BUG
根據 Directive 2004/38/EC
Article 1(a)
the conditions governing the exercise of the right of free movement and residence within the territory of the Member States by Union citizens and their family members;

Article 2
1) "Union citizen" means any person having the nationality of a Member State;

明顯BNO係英國國籍

但係英國做咗一樣好仆街既野
就係佢係1972年入EEC( EU前身) 既時候對國籍作出聲明
As to the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, the
terms “nationals”, “nationals of Member States” or “nationals of Member
States and overseas countries and territories”, wherever used in the Treaty establishing the European Economic Community þ or in any of the Community acts deriving from those Treaties, are to be understood to
refer to:
(a) persons who are citizens of the United Kingdom and Colonies or
British subjects not possessing that citizenship or the citizenship of
any other Commonwealth country or territory, who, in either case,
have the right of abode in the United Kingdom, and are therefore
exempt from United Kingdom immigration control;
(b) persons who are citizens of the United Kingdom and Colonies by
birth or by registration or naturalisation in Gibraltar, or whose father
was so born, registered or naturalised.

應該唔係架啦，但都想問下
CD Projekt?

係1981年英國更新既國籍法然後Replace咗舊既係EC Delcaration
As to the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, the
terms “nationals”, “nationals of Member States” or “nationals of Member
States and overseas countries and territories”, wherever used in the Treaty establishing the European Economic Community . . . or in any of the Community acts deriving from those Treaties, are to be understood to
refer to:

(a) British citizens;
(b) Persons who are British subjects by virtue of Part IV of the British
Nationality Act 1981 and who have the right of abode in the
United Kingdom and are therefore exempt from United Kingdom
immigration control;
(c) British Dependent Territories citizens who acquire their citizenship
from a connection with Gibraltar.

quote.msg:
應該唔係架啦，但都想問下
CD Projekt?

replies.msg:
唔係(雖然同一個城市)
我都想

最有趣既野黎喇
係1982年declaration改咗BDTC做BOC
所以有班係英國既馬來西亞人/非洲人好撚慘,
佢地係佢出生既國家獨立前去拎住BDTC去咗英國,
之後出生地既國家獨立咗 跟住英國1981年改國籍法
佢地係英國拎住本廢既passport 冇福利冇工作權
BNO係Hong Kong (British Nationality) Order 1986 整出黎既
不過1982年係英國最後一次submit 聲明比EU

打後英國冇對BNO係歐洲既權利作出任何delcaration

所以係1991年有個叫Manjit Kaur既East African Asian拎住BOC想係英國申請居留權，但係比home office rejected。最後佢告上英國High Court, 之後仲上埋European Court of Justice

C-192/99呢個case The Queen v Secretary of State for the Home Department, ex parte: Manjit Kaur
佢CJEU judgement果到話EU citizen既定義係由所屬既member state定
所以refer番1981 British Nationality Act,同埋1982年比意大利政府既Declaration
http://curia.europa.eu/juris/showPdf.jsf?text=&docid=46193&pageIndex=0&doclang=en&mode=lst&dir=&occ=first&part=1&cid=10977321

Judegement主要既原因係
1. 佢想住英國, 冇Trigger到Treaty 講緊係第二個成員國既Free Movement
2. 佢拎BOC, 係聲明講得好清楚 佢唔係EU Citizen
所以Kaur上訴失敗
屌你 BNO無work permit 咪即係打黑工
巴打家下打算下一歩點
BNO點會唔使work permit做野

不過有趣既事又嚟喇
同一時間
Case C-256/99 有個香港人叫Cheung Chiu Hung 拎BNO想係apply英國居留權，最後又係上到ECJ


不過ECJ冇直接解答英國High Court向ECJ提出既問題
https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/PDF/?uri=CELEX:C1999/246/42&qid=1549759327053&from=EN

quote.msg: BNO點會唔使work permit做野

replies.msg:
我之前幫過兩間based係歐洲大陸既公司做野 都唔洗work permit
但係果陣我住係英國 間唔中飛去開會
而家搬咗去波蘭
我公司有同我簽合約
而且每個月都同波蘭政府交緊稅+health care

我以爲啲未出過香港既傻仔先當自己eu
去做嘢都唔接受現實同睇清楚

replies.msg:
Directive 2004/38/EC Article 2
1) "Union citizen" means any person having the nationality of a Member State;

Treaty of Lisbon
PROVISIONS ON DEMOCRATIC PRINCIPLES
Article 8
In all its activities, the Union shall observe the principle of the equality of its citizens, who shall receive equal attention from its institutions, bodies, offices and agencies. Every national of a Member State shall be a citizen of the Union. Citizenship of the Union shall be additional to national citizenship and shall not replace it.
除非你同我講BNO唔係英國既國籍

replies.msg:
其實主要分EU Law 同 National Law兩樣野
UK National Law無可否認BNO 係冇right of abode
但係EU law既基礎principle入面係唔應該存在descrimination of nationality
(當然每個memebr state可以簡咩EU法例 唔接受)
因為EU 出Directives後-->國家本地立法
明顯英國係國籍法呢方面 唔跟EU

所以ECJ既Judgement咪話英國可以決定自己國民有咩權利
但係講到行使EU權利 ECJ就冇講到喇
支持op用1個月既時間溝到波蘭妹兼訂埋婚

Treaty of Lisbon
